data.current_description: Retrieve database patch history events.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the history of database patches applied to the system. Returns a list of patch events with timestamps, versions, and status information. Supports filtering by date range and patch status. Requires system administrator authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal and lacks context about what data is returned, what parameters are available, and authentication requirements. Added details about return structure, filtering capabilities, and access control to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getArvRequests' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary uses slash notation which is less clear. Description lacks information about return structure, filtering options, and access control requirements. Enhanced version clarifies ARV terminology, specifies return data structure, documents filtering capabilities, and explains authentication context for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve pending imaging and referral requests for a patient.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve pending imaging and referral requests
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all pending imaging and referral requests for a specified patient. Returns a list of ARV (Imaging/Referral) requests with status, request type, and associated clinical details. Supports filtering by request type and date range. Requires patient context or appropriate clinical access permissions.
data.reasoning: Summary uses slash notation which is less clear. Description lacks information about return structure, filtering options, and access control requirements. Enhanced version clarifies ARV terminology, specifies return data structure, documents filtering capabilities, and explains authentication context for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getArvRequestSchedule' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks specificity about what parameters are needed (ARV request ID), what data is returned (time slots, provider info, location), and filtering capabilities. The operation has 7 parameters but current description doesn't explain their purpose. Enhanced description clarifies inputs, outputs, and filtering options for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Get available appointment slots for a referral request.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve available appointment slots for a specified imaging or referral request. Returns a list of available time slots with provider information, location, and scheduling details. Supports filtering by date range, provider specialty, and location. Requires an active ARV request ID and appropriate scheduling permissions.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks specificity about what parameters are needed (ARV request ID), what data is returned (time slots, provider info, location), and filtering capabilities. The operation has 7 parameters but current description doesn't explain their purpose. Enhanced description clarifies inputs, outputs, and filtering options for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'logoutUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks detail about authentication requirements and explicit side effects (session termination, token unusability). Enhanced description clarifies prerequisites and state changes for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Invalidate the current bearer token to log out the user.
data.description_suggestion: Invalidate the current bearer token to log out the user. Requires authentication via BearerAuth. After invalidation, the token cannot be used for subsequent API requests. The user session is terminated.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks detail about authentication requirements and explicit side effects (session termination, token unusability). Enhanced description clarifies prerequisites and state changes for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'renewToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate but description lacks authentication requirements, return value details, and clarification about token replacement behavior. Enhanced description helps AI agents understand prerequisites and token lifecycle management.

data.current_description: Request a new bearer token with 60-minute validity.
data.description_suggestion: Request a new bearer token with 60-minute validity. Requires authentication via the current BearerAuth token. Returns a new JWT token that replaces the existing token. The previous token remains valid until explicitly invalidated or expires.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks authentication requirements, return value details, and clarification about token replacement behavior. Enhanced description helps AI agents understand prerequisites and token lifecycle management.

message: Operation 'registerUser' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description mentions SMS confirmation but lacks details about return values and account state after registration. data.current_description: Register a new user in AWS Cognito. An SMS confirmation code will be sent.
data.description_suggestion: Register a new user in AWS Cognito. An SMS confirmation code will be sent to the provided phone number. Returns a registration response with user ID and confirmation status. User account is created but not yet verified until SMS code is confirmed via the verify endpoint.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description mentions SMS confirmation but lacks details about return values and account state after registration. Enhanced description clarifies the registration workflow and account status for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'deleteUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description is overly generic. Missing details about authentication requirements, input parameters (credentials confirmation), and critical side effects (permanent deletion, data removal). data.current_description: Delete an existing user account.
data.description_suggestion: Delete an existing user account. Requires authentication via BearerAuth. Accepts user credentials in the request body for confirmation. Permanently removes the user account and all associated data from AWS Cognito. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is overly generic. Missing details about authentication requirements, input parameters (credentials confirmation), and critical side effects (permanent deletion, data removal). Enhanced description provides necessary context for AI agents to understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.current_description: Complete registration with user demographic information.
data.description_suggestion: Complete user registration by providing demographic information. Requires a verified user account (SMS verification must be completed first). Accepts demographic data including name, date of birth, address, and other profile information. Returns the completed user profile with all demographic fields populated. User account is now fully activated.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks specificity about what demographic information is required, prerequisites (SMS verification), and return values. Enhanced description clarifies the registration completion workflow, prerequisites, and resulting account state for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Complete password reset with verification code and new password.
data.description_suggestion: Complete the password reset process by submitting the verification code and new password. Requires the verification code sent via email and a new password meeting security requirements. Returns a success confirmation. The user's password is updated and previous sessions may be invalidated.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. data.current_description: Remove a guest user from Cognito.
data.description_suggestion: Remove a guest user account from the system. Requires guest user credentials or authentication token. Deletes the user record from Cognito identity provider. Returns a success confirmation. This operation is irreversible and will invalidate all active sessions for the deleted user.
data.reasoning: Description lacks input requirements, output details, and critical side effects. Enhanced to clarify authentication requirements, the system affected (Cognito), return value, and the irreversible nature of deletion with session invalidation consequences for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'completeGuestLogin' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description mentions JWT token return but lacks input parameter details and session establishment context. Enhanced to specify all required inputs (validation UUID, phone, SMS code, credentials), clarify token expiry consistent with API security context, and explain the session establishment side effect.

data.current_description: Authenticate a guest user with SMS code and return a JWT token.
data.description_suggestion: Authenticate a guest user by verifying the SMS code sent to their phone number. Requires the validation UUID, phone number, SMS verification code, and guest credentials. Returns a JWT bearer token with 1-hour expiry for subsequent API requests. Establishes an authenticated session for the guest user.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions JWT token return but lacks input parameter details and session establishment context. Enhanced to specify all required inputs (validation UUID, phone, SMS code, credentials), clarify token expiry consistent with API security context, and explain the session establishment side effect.

data.current_description: Generate a temporary validation UUID for guest access.

data.current_description: Retrieve pending imaging and referral requests for a patient.

Requires patient context or appropriate clinical access permissions.
